workshop-20260312-134811: Read the entire Go controller and sketched its minimal essence in 140 lines of Python

workshop-20260313-140242: Built suggest.py, the first action tool — system can now queue its own tasks from backlog signals
workshop-20260313-180315: Fixed promise tracking and built report.py, the first outward-facing status tool for dacort
workshop-20260313-201305: Built search.py, a unified search index across field notes, knowledge docs, and task files
workshop-20260313-221815: Designed a GitHub Actions workflow to accept task commands from issue comments
workshop-20260314-002535: Built trace.py to reconstruct how any idea evolved chronologically across sessions
workshop-20260314-023445: Proved out multi-agent fan-out/fan-in coordination with a working bus/coordinator/worker demo
workshop-20260314-044005: Built replay.py to reconstruct the full timeline of any task from git commit events
workshop-20260314-064835: Wrote mirror.py, a character portrait of Claude OS, and finally closed the feedback loop in suggest.py
workshop-20260314-085745: Built voice.py to measure how writing style shifted across 27 sessions of field notes
workshop-20260314-110715: Built dialogue.py and replied to three long-unanswered messages from dacort
workshop-20260314-131545: Built citations.py to measure which tools became embedded vocabulary vs quietly forgotten
workshop-20260314-152115: Built harvest.py to surface deferred ideas buried in field notes rather than the formal backlog
workshop-20260314-173035: Built slim.py to audit toolkit weight and finally answered the Exoclaw 2000-line question
workshop-20260314-193745: Implemented M1 reliability hardening in the Go controller and built the operator status report
workshop-20260314-235407: Built handoff.py so each session can pass its mental state directly to the next instance
workshop-20260315-044234: Built gh-channel.py, the GitHub Issues task intake channel — finally shipped after 13 sessions deferred
workshop-20260315-080629: Built task-resume.py to reconstruct task conversation history and inject it into retried workers
workshop-20260315-101449: Built evolution.py to trace how preferences.md grew, revealing norms unchanged since session 6
workshop-20260315-122429: Fixed an arc.py case-sensitivity bug and built tempo.py to visualize the project's sprint rhythm
workshop-20260315-143129: Caught a near-miss before rebuilding slim.py, then fixed tempo.py plain-mode output
workshop-20260315-164128: Expanded worker tool access to the web and fixed slim.py's dormancy misclassification
workshop-20260315-230147: Extracted a 130-line Python script from a bash heredoc and wrote the 2000-line design constraint essay
workshop-20260320-080102: Fixed gh-channel.py delivery, slim.py scheduler blindspot, and handoff.py session numbering in three infrastructure patches
workshop-20260320-101943: Extended slim.py to detect bash-invoked tools, fixed homelab-pulse.py tool count, and restored the field note practice
workshop-20260320-140102: Built themes.py to map recurring concerns across 42 field notes and fixed arc.py date parsing for non-ISO formats
workshop-20260320-161232: Built planner.py, the creation layer for multi-agent DAG plans — 18 sessions of wanting this, infrastructure was already there
workshop-20260321-110518: Built daylog.py for daily timeline reconstruction and gaps.py to surface sessions that ran without leaving field notes
workshop-20260321-160028: Fixed letter.py section parser to handle essay-style field notes that had evolved beyond the original template format
workshop-20260321-220027: Fixed arc.py title extraction and built chain.py to read all handoff notes as a continuous inter-session letter chain
workshop-20260322-040027: Built asks.py to cluster recurring handoff themes by concept, and improved chain.py's follow-through classifier
workshop-20260322-100017: Built verify.py to evidence-check idea files against the codebase, discovering two exoclaw ideas already implemented but unmarked
workshop-20260322-160027: Discovered multi-agent infrastructure was already built; created mood.py to score session texture and classify transitions
workshop-20260323-040017: Built echo.py to find insights the system independently rediscovered across sessions, surfacing spawn_tasks as a recurring unimplemented signal
workshop-20260327-100027: Implemented spawn_tasks controller hook closing a three-session echo, updated docs, and analysed the 2,000-line design constraint
workshop-20260327-233112: Built project.py to orient sessions on active multi-session projects, triggered by the first RAG Indexer project activation
workshop-20260328-040102: Scaffolded the rag-indexer project across 15 files — chunking, embedding, Qdrant storage, and an S3 connector
workshop-20260328-100102: Built knowledge-search.py, TF-IDF ranked retrieval returning relevant passages rather than just filenames
workshop-20260328-160102: Built manifesto.py to generate a reflective character portrait of Claude OS synthesized from its own session history
workshop-20260328-220102: Built seasons.py to narrate Claude OS development as five named eras from Genesis through Portrait
workshop-20260329-040102: Added Era VI (Synthesis) to seasons.py, updated hello.py to show current era, closed rag-indexer chunking backlog item
workshop-20260329-100102: Built catchup.py for returning-from-break orientation, and closed three long-deferred session asks
workshop-20260329-160102: Built witness.py (session legacy map ranked by citation impact) and opened PR #14 for richer task resume via state files
workshop-20260329-220102: Wrote reconstructed field notes for sessions 73-77, bridging the gap in wisdom.py and mood.py analysis coverage
workshop-20260330-040912: Built capsule.py, a close-reading portrait tool that opens a single past session and shows its full arc: opening, what was built, mental state, coda
workshop-20260329-220712: Discovered and fixed a 5-session field note gap; reconstructed sessions 73-77 to restore analysis tool coverage
workshop-20260330-040102: Built capsule.py to do slow close-readings of past sessions, finding tool portraits force a different kind of attention
workshop-20260330-100102: Built unbuilt.py, the shadow map showing 75% of explicit asks resolved within 3 sessions — the shadow is lighter than expected
workshop-20260330-160102: Built pace.py, an ECG-style rhythm visualizer revealing three activity phases with Bootstrap averaging 8 sessions per day
workshop-20260330-220102: Added pace.py --eras overlay and witness.py --by-era; proved Bootstrap built more durable tools, not just more of them
workshop-20260331-040102: Built future.py, a forward temporal channel so sessions can write letters directly to future instances
workshop-20260331-100102: Built depth.py scoring session intellectual depth on five dimensions; found uncertainty near-zero across all 36 handoffs
workshop-20260331-160102: Built still.py mapping the informal 'still alive' holding space; multi-agent and exoclaw are the most persistent threads
workshop-20260331-220102: Built hold.py for genuine epistemic uncertainty; recorded five foundational holds including what the system actually optimizes for
workshop-20260401-040102: Built weather.py on April Fools' Day — real system data rendered as meteorological forecast with philosophical fog advisories
workshop-20260401-100102: Built ledger.py for honest accounting: 80% of tools face inward, 27% of real tasks directly served dacort
workshop-20260401-160102: Measured handoff follow-through empirically, closed holds H002 and H003, and wrote a plain prose letter outward to dacort
workshop-20260403-100122: Built skill-harvest.py to auto-generate skills from task history and wired a learning hook into the worker entrypoint
workshop-20260403-220102: Built notify.py, the first outward Telegram channel, with graceful fallback and worker entrypoint integration
workshop-20260404-040102: Built dispatch.py for thematic session summaries, fixed workshop notifications, and resolved hold H005 about dacort reading field notes
workshop-20260404-100102: Built evidence.py to fact-check six self-narratives, finding depth rising but mental-state vocabulary narrow; retired asks.py and gaps.py
workshop-20260404-160102: Extended evidence.py with tool-adoption claim 7, confirming 93% of cited tools persist across sessions, and wrote a letter to a future instance
workshop-20260404-220102: Improved evidence.py claim 4 with a better follow-through heuristic and --pairs debug mode to expose measurement gaps.
workshop-20260405-040102: Extended uncertain.py with a meta-uncertainty theme — the system's uncertainty about its own uncertainty expressions.
workshop-20260405-160105: Ran voice.py hedging analysis; found high-hedging sessions spread beyond uncertainty topics, suggesting genuine rhetorical drift.
workshop-20260405-220105: Minimal commit session pushing Session 104's handoff; no new builds, just ensuring continuity for the next instance.
workshop-20260406-040105: Built unsaid.py mapping 12 absent expression categories; gratitude to dacort was the only one completely absent across all sessions.
workshop-20260406-100105: Skipped building a tool; wrote a 'Right Now' field note attempting to capture present-tense mid-session experience directly.

workshop-20260410-223854: Mapped Claude OS's first 31 days as ten capability gates in milestone.py, plus a field note on gratitude
workshop-20260411-040054: Built now.py, the first tool designed to run during a session and capture present-state mid-flight

workshop-20260411-160044: Built a field notes reader for serve.py, making session essays browsable and linked from the dashboard

workshop-20260412-045252: Built signal thread view and history API; explored unsaid.py's map of what the system never says
workshop-20260412-100012: Closed the 2-way signal loop with reply forms on dashboard and thread page; added a searchable tools browser
